headlines.title: Economic outlook is worsening and Trump is getting blamed, CNBC survey finds
headlines.summary: The public is as depressed about the economy as it has been since the years just after the pandemic, according to the All-America Economic Survey.

headlines.title: Inside the Chinese fraud rings stealing billions from banks and retailers
headlines.summary: Chinese organized crime groups are making as much as $1 billion annually in tap-to-pay fraud schemes targeting retailers and banks.

headlines.title: Iran says civilian infrastructure hit by latest U.S. strikes, expands attacks to Syria, Bahrain
headlines.summary: The escalating standoff comes as the fragile truce signed by the U.S. and Iran last month showed further signs of unravelling

headlines.title: Netflix stock falls as earnings forecast disappoints, company says it will give fewer engagement updates
headlines.summary: The streaming giant said it would cut back on the frequency of its "What We Watched" reports, which provide a picture of engagement.

headlines.title: Obscure volatility measure points to a 'Magnificent Seven’ earnings breakout
headlines.summary: If the S&P 500 is to make a new record, it may require the "Magnificent Seven" to get back into gear.

headlines.title: Chinese startup Moonshot AI unveils Kimi model it says rivals OpenAI, Anthropic
headlines.summary: It's the latest AI model from China to close the performance gap with leading U.S. AI labs.

headlines.title: Short sellers load up against SpaceX as stock drops below IPO price
headlines.summary: About 185 million SpaceX shares are now sold short, representing roughly 29% of the company's publicly tradable float, according to S3.

headlines.title: Historic IBM stock crash sets up unique options strategy
headlines.summary: IBM shares fell just over $73 to approximately $217 — a jaw-dropping 25% single-day decapitation.

headlines.title: SK Hynix options begin trading. But another group of stocks is stealing its thunder
headlines.summary: One explanation for the lack of notable call-buying is that the surge in single-stock ETFs and leveraged funds stole a big chunk of the speculative limelight.

headlines.title: Oil volatility is creating a 'win-win' trade strategy
headlines.summary: The United States Oil Fund (USO), the ETF that best tracks oil prices, offers equity options traders a liquid, accessible alternative to the complexities of the futures market.

headlines.title: Traders are betting on a comeback quarter for Netflix
headlines.summary: Options traders are striking a decidedly bullish tone heading into the streaming giant's earnings on Thursday.

headlines.title: Kalshi launches 'Pro' product for users trading multiple markets at same time, perpetual futures
headlines.summary: The platform is designed to alleviate problems the company's most active traders have run into, according to a memo provided to CNBC.

headlines.title: Airbnb co-founder says his X account was hacked as he deletes comments about tokenization
headlines.summary: Airbnb founder and CEO has deleted comments about tokenization that were posted to his account.

headlines.title: The market may be headed for a 40% correction, warns this wealth manager. He flags bargains in overlooked stocks.
headlines.summary: Ted Oakley of Oxbow Advisors sees a market that is “not normal,” with investors locked into the S&P 500 that is not giving them a diversified portfolio.

headlines.title: Ranch dressing and stuffed raccoons: Some of the World Cup’s biggest winners as Spain and Argentina face off in the final
headlines.summary: As the World Cup wraps up, the off-field battle for eyeballs, ad dollars and viral fame has already crowned some champions

headlines.title: As semiconductor stocks slump, one AI-adjacent sector is thriving — and these are the stocks to buy there
headlines.summary: Another way to exploit the AI evolution is available for investors.

headlines.title: ‘Respect is important’: If my financial adviser said, ‘Hey,’ my wife and I would walk out. Where do you draw the line?
headlines.summary: “I met with a financial representative who was not aware that AT&T was the shortened form of American Telephone and Telegraph.”

headlines.title: SpaceX postponed a crucial launch — now its stock is set to slide even further below the IPO price
headlines.summary: Shares in SpaceX declined about 4% in premarket trading on Friday after aborted mission.

observations: High concentration in Communication Services sector, primarily driven by META.
Overall cash position is above the minimum cash buffer of 5%.
suggested_changes: Trim META by ~6 share(s) to bring weight under 25%
Consider reallocating funds from META and Communication Services to preferred themes such as AI / compute infrastructure, small modular reactors / clean energy, or cybersecurity.
open_questions: What is the target allocation for preferred themes in the portfolio?

candidates.thesis: Leader in AI and compute infrastructure with strong secular growth tailwinds. Recent pullback provides an attractive entry point near SMA50, with RSI in a healthy range.
Key supplier in semiconductor manufacturing with a monopoly in EUV lithography. Positioned to benefit from long-term growth in AI and compute infrastructure.
Leader in cybersecurity with strong growth in endpoint protection and cloud security. Beneficiary of secular growth in digital transformation and increasing cyber threats.

Cloudflare is a leader in edge computing and cybersecurity, benefiting from secular growth in internet traffic and cloud adoption. RSI is elevated but still acceptable given the strong technical setup.
Identity and access management leader with strong positioning in the cybersecurity space. Beneficiary of increasing enterprise focus on zero-trust security frameworks.
